name: Forest Factory Simulator
short_description: Build, automate, and thrive in Forest Factory! Chop trees, craft wooden goods, and sell them to grow your factory. Manage your depot, fulfill orders, and balance nature with machinery in a serene forest setting. Experience automation in the wild!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Forest Factory, a realistic simulation game where nature meets industrial automation! Immerse yourself in a lush forest filled with towering trees, ambient nature sounds, and the hum of advanced machinery. Chop down trees with your trusty axe, automate production with cutting-edge machines, and build a thriving factory to craft wooden goods.

Manage your resources wisely—use transport carts to move timber, store materials in your depot, and fulfill orders to grow your business. From crafting simple planks to producing intricate wooden items, every step of the process is in your hands. Sell your products to earn money, purchase new machines, and expand your operations. With a dynamic order system, you’ll need to balance efficiency and strategy to succeed in this unique blend of nature and technology.

Key Features:

  • Realistic Tree Cutting: Wield your axe and fell trees in a beautifully detailed forest.

  • Automation & Machinery: Set up machines, conveyor belts, and transport carts to streamline production.

  • Crafting & Selling: Produce wooden goods, from planks to furniture, and sell them to meet customer demands.

  • Dynamic Order System: Take on orders, manage your depot, and grow your factory.

  • Immersive Environment: Experience the serenity of nature with ambient sounds, paired with the satisfying clank of industrial machines.

Step into the world of Forest Factory and turn the wilderness into a masterpiece of automation!

supported_languages:
English*, Turkish*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese*, Korean*, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
